error_signature: 404 - The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: Google Sheets resource not found error
symptom: When trying to access a specific sheet in Google Sheets, n8n returns a 404 error stating that the resource could not be found.
not_this_if: The sheet name is correctly specified and exists
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the specified sheet name does not exist in the Google Sheets document or if there is a temporary issue with the Google Sheets API. It may also happen if the credentials are not properly refreshed or if the node configuration is outdated.
fix_steps: Refresh or re-login to your Google Sheets credentials in n8n
Delete the existing Google Sheets node
Re-add the Google Sheets node and select the correct document and sheet
agent_instruction: Refresh your credentials and re-add the Google Sheets node to resolve the issue.
